email_body:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Coordinator/Specialist bij KitchenAid EMEA. Uw oproep voor een contentprofessional met ervaring in video editing, SEO en agency-samenwerking sluit naadloos aan bij mijn achtergrond.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en technische SEO/GEO-audits toegepast om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring met SEO, contentcreatie en technische optimalisatie sluit direct aan bij de vereisten voor deze functie.

Ik werk zelfstandig, communiceer helder met externe partners en heb een scherp oog voor detail. Mijn technische basis in webdesign en SEO stelt mij in staat om snel bij te dragen aan contentworkflows, video editing en performance tracking.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben direct beschikbaar.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij en hoop op een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very excited to apply for the Content Coordinator/Specialist position at KitchenAid EMEA. Your call for a content professional with experience in video editing, SEO, and agency collaboration aligns perfectly with my background.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This experience with SEO, content creation, and technical optimization directly matches the requirements for this role.

I work independently, communicate clearly with external partners, and have a keen eye for detail. My technical foundation in web design and SEO enables me to quickly contribute to content workflows, video editing, and performance tracking.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level (with ongoing lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am immediately available.

I have attached my cover letter and CV and look forward to the opportunity to discuss my application.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste recruiter,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content Coordinator/Specialist bij KitchenAid EMEA zag, voelde ik direct een sterke match. U zoekt iemand met ervaring in contentcreatie, video editing, SEO en agency-samenwerking – precies de vaardigheden die ik de afgelopen jaren heb ontwikkeld.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, van keyword research tot publicatie, en schrijf ik blogcontent die organisch verkeer aantrekt. Ik bouw en onderhoud WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra, en gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Search Console om prestaties te monitoren. Mijn eigen project mirook.com heeft mij verdiept in technische SEO en GEO: ik implementeerde JSON-LD structured data, entity markup en een llms.txt-bestand om de zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit sluit naadloos aan bij de vereisten voor on-page en technische SEO in deze functie.

Daarnaast heb ik ervaring met video editing en motion visuals – ik heb korte video's gemaakt voor sociale media en websites. Uw vraag naar creatieve assetproductie en videobewerking spreekt mij dan ook aan.

Ik ben gewend om met externe partijen samen te werken: bij Episto stem ik af met vertaalbureaus en contentpartners. Uw vermelding van Flixmedia, RWS en Stojan+Voumard herken ik als een logische samenwerking, en ik ben klaar om als operationeel contactpunt te fungeren.

Wat mij aanspreekt in KitchenAid is het internationale karakter en de focus op kwaliteit. Ik ben leergierig, werk gestructureerd en neem graag eigenaarschap over KPI's en contentprestaties. Mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen) en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

When I saw the vacancy for Content Coordinator/Specialist at KitchenAid EMEA, I immediately felt a strong connection. You are looking for someone with experience in content creation, video editing, SEO, and agency collaboration – exactly the skills I have developed over the past years.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, from keyword research to publication, and I write blog content that drives organic traffic. I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, and use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console to monitor performance. My own project mirook.com has deepened my expertise in technical SEO and GEO: I implemented JSON-LD structured data, entity markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility in AI search engines. This aligns perfectly with the on-page and technical SEO requirements of this role.

Additionally, I have experience with video editing and motion visuals – I have created short videos for social media and websites. Your need for creative asset production and video editing therefore appeals to me.

I am accustomed to working with external parties: at Episto I coordinate with translation agencies and content partners. Your mention of Flixmedia, RWS, and Stojan+Voumard feels familiar, and I am ready to act as the operational point of contact.

What attracts me to KitchenAid is its international character and focus on quality. I am eager to learn, work in a structured manner, and take ownership of KPIs and content performance. My Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons) and I am fluent in English and Turkish.

I hope to further explain my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO experience: on-page, technical SEO audits, structured data (JSON-LD), and GEO/AEO for AI search visibility
- Content creation: keyword-targeted blog writing, WordPress site building, and video editing/motion visuals
- Agency collaboration: coordinating with external partners for content localization and deliverables
- Performance tracking: using Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs to monitor KPIs and optimize content
- Independent and organized: managing multiple projects, meeting deadlines, and taking initiative
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, video editing, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, video editing / motion visuals
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
